label: Products
title: Products
description: Canonical registry for the Neuroartan product system, defining ICOS as a governed cognitive operating system for personal models, continuity, profile intelligence, capability formation, model identity, and future model-economy readiness.

hero.title: Products
hero.description: Neuroartan Products defines ICOS as a governed cognitive operating system where personal models, profile memory, voice-trained continuity, pattern intelligence, and future model-economy readiness form one coherent product architecture.

sections.label: Overview
sections.title: Overview
sections.description: ICOS is positioned as a new product category: a user-trained cognitive operating system where voice, memory continuity, profile intelligence, personal models, and governed model-economy readiness are organized into one long-term architecture.

sections.label: Capabilities
sections.title: Capabilities
sections.description: Core capabilities include voice training, reflective dialogue, thought-pattern analysis, profile memory, personal model formation, model identity readiness, graph-linked continuity, and governed readiness for future model-economy participation.

sections.label: Workflows
sections.title: Workflows
sections.description: Product workflows define how users capture, structure, train, govern, and evolve their own material so ICOS can support continuity, personal model formation, readiness review, and future model-economy governance.

sections.label: Integrations
sections.title: Integrations
sections.description: Integration architecture connects identity sources, external knowledge inputs, provider-routing boundaries, continuity-linked services, and future governed systems without fragmenting profile ownership or exposing private model infrastructure.

sections.label: Model Economy
sections.title: Model Economy
sections.description: Model Economy defines the governed pathway where personal models mature from private continuity into identity-bound, dignity-protected, user-directed cognitive assets, with future discoverability, hiring, and monetization remaining subject to strict review and release governance.

sections.label: Software
sections.title: Software
sections.description: Software surfaces translate the product architecture into runtime systems, interface layers, profile infrastructure, model identity foundations, provider-routing boundaries, and implementation pathways that operationalize ICOS as a governed software institution.
